text.message: It’s fine :) new game new perspective on life
I just think that you have to think about the power dynamic on the board and if you end someone’s game you have to be ok with them targeting you
I know but I only did so well because I got very lucky
I checked the stats, the rolls were pretty standard
Oh you missed a fun one
Me and OJ are chilly now tho
Yeah I’ve had a few enemies to friends situations on this game
Only got 6 cards from it tho
I know but that’s because I was purposely just trying to take your road hahaha
Irony is we were battling for road and your name is road man
Hey man, gotta stand on business
Longest road is the only viable path to the win
If someone feeds brick it might work ou
oh yeh. my bad. im dumb
i am so bad at this game
cant give oj the port so early
Anyone else willing to help tho
why wouldnt you block their ore
It was probably either a city or settle
Need to get those robbers on tree
i was afk and missed the blocck
It’s alright red will put it on me
Ugh that misclick just cost me
It might seem like me but i think 6 was the play
Im not that much of a threat yet
im just getting caught in the cross fire
Hey you guys traded it to me
i got confused on who said yes
Tbf I’m 52nd so not much better
Soz none of that helps me
yes oj rolls it this time tho
Or more if i get blocked
Eh, then just the next round
gives you a few chances to win
